audit_items.proof_trace: IGNORE validation prevents forwarding (correct) but lacks explicit re-processing queue. Messages with FutureSlot/PastFinalizedSlot errors return IGNORE without application-level re-queuing, unlike ParentUnknown which explicitly queues for sync. Proof fails on reprocessability guarantee.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends data columns just outside clock disparity window. Node returns IGNORE (no forward, correct) but never re-processes when slot becomes valid, causing availability failures if those columns are needed for reconstruction.
